span.p:
github_fetcher.py
Fetches real bug reports from
GitHub API using PyGithub

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
data/bugs_raw.json
Raw GitHub issues with
comments, labels, metadata

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
data/bugs_processed.json
Cleaned bugs with ground truth
labels: criticality, severity,
root cause, assignee

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
tasks.py
Defines 3 task configs:
criticality, severity,
root cause + assignee

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
data/contributors.json
Maps contributors to teams
for partial-credit scoring

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
src/models.py
Pydantic models: BugReport,
Observation, Action, Reward,
GroundTruth + Enums

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
src/env.py
OpenEnv-compliant env with
reset(), step(), state()
methods

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
src/utils.py
Helper functions for
data loading & validation

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
src/graders.py
3 graders: binary criticality,
partial-credit severity,
weighted root cause + assignee

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
src/reward.py
RewardCalculator: base score
+ confidence, reasoning,
edge case bonuses

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
inference.py
Entry point: LLM-based baseline
agent using OpenAI client.
Outputs [START]/[STEP]/[END]

2 vCPU / 8GB RAM target

openenv.yaml
